frameworks.title: Community Networks of Commodity Markets
frameworks.question: Do 23 commodity futures (energy / metals / agri / softs / livestock) exhibit the same long-memory + multi-scale wavelet + quantile-TE network signatures observed in G20 equity markets?
frameworks.iref_note: P2-6 squad memo flagged uncertainty: this paper MIGHT be the IREF-D-26-02932 base manuscript, OR the IREF revision belongs to a different paper. PI to confirm.
frameworks.cran_packages_misplaced_note: Per P2-6 squad inventory: 3 of the 4 R-packages currently in commodity/ belong to other papers — WaveQTE-master = waveqte sibling, stockContagion = stock-contagion sister paper, ManyIVsNets = Environmental Phillips Curve paper. Phase-1 cleanup: git mv these out of commodity/ once their proper homes are confirmed.

engine_implementation_notes.long_memory: Qu-2011 + Sibbertsen-2018 tests + DFA rolling 260-day window stepped 24 days (but manuscript §3.1 describes Knight-2017 LiftLRD instead — METHODS<->CODE DRIFT, P2-6 §3 finding)
engine_implementation_notes.multi_scale_wavelet: Achard-Gannaz-2016 MWW for fractal connectivity (Daubechies-8, scales 2-8)
engine_implementation_notes.transfer_entropy: MODWT(LA8, J=4) + quantile TE at tau in {0.05, 0.50, 0.95}
engine_implementation_notes.iaaft_surrogates: NONE — no surrogate-based significance for QTE edges (P2-6 §7 recommendation)
engine_implementation_notes.gfc_dating: 1 Aug 2007 (Brunnermeier-style) — DIFFERS from NAMH/MCPFM 2008Q3 (cross-paper consistency marker #5)

headline_metrics.label: Commodity futures panel
headline_metrics.note: 4 Energy + 4 Precious metals + 1 Industrial (Copper) + 14 Agri/Soft/Livestock

headline_metrics.label: Crisis windows analysed
headline_metrics.note: Pre-Crisis 2005-07 / Subprime 2007Q3-2009Q4 / Sovereign Debt / Stock Crash 2015-16 / Pre-COVID / COVID / Russia-Ukraine / Recovery 2024-25

headline_metrics.label: Hurst rolling window
headline_metrics.note: 260-day rolling stepped 24 days; cf. NAMH 252-day stepped daily

open_issues: Author byline EMPTY (manuscript.tex:45 \author{}) — fill before any submission
Methods<->code drift on Hurst estimator (LiftLRD claimed in §3.1 vs DFA in code) — resolve before submission
No surrogate-based significance for QTE edges — add via parboot or shuffle test
commodityFC R-pkg has placeholder author 'Ecolex Research'; missing man/tests/vignettes/NEWS.md — fix CRAN hygiene before any CRAN push
IREF revision identity unclear — confirm whether THIS paper is IREF-D-26-02932 or whether IREF base is a different paper
Stuck on IV identification (per CLAUDE.md §6) — but commodity paper has NO IV section; the IV work lives in stockContagion/ sister paper. CLAUDE.md note needs clarification.

cross_paper_relationships.relation: shares Hurst + multi-scale-wavelet substrate; differs in TE estimator (quantile vs KSG) and community detection (CNM vs Leiden) and asset class (commodities vs equities)
WaveQTE-master R-package historically lives under commodity/ — should move out
shares MODWT + quantile-TE substrate; differs in absent Stage-2 channel attribution

frameworks.title: Contagion Channel Identification (paper3 / WQTE structural)
frameworks.question: What proportion of cross-border equity contagion is attributable to Trade / Financial / Geopolitical / Behavioural / Monetary-Policy channels across 18 G20 markets, 2006-2026?
frameworks.arxiv_title: What Drives Contagion? Identifying and Attributing Cross-Border Transmission Mechanisms

engine_implementation_notes.transfer_entropy: Wavelet-Quantile Transfer Entropy (WQTE) — quantile-conditioned TE via Koenker quantile-regression predictive gain
engine_implementation_notes.iaaft_surrogates: B=1000 shuffled surrogates for QTE; B=300 bootstrap CIs; B=2000 placebo (per v2_run.R:17)
engine_implementation_notes.structural_channel_attribution: Stage 2 = IV/2SLS (channel-specific external instruments per Stock-Watson 2018) + LASSO (Belloni-Chernozhukov-Hansen 2014) + LP (Jorda 2005) + Rigobon 2003 heteroskedasticity-ID + Cinelli-Hazlett 2020 sensitivity bounds
engine_implementation_notes.absolute_thresholding: Pre-Crisis Q75 anchor; subsequent windows compared against this constant — fixes the v1 percentile-thresholding artifact (Pre-Crisis density 25.16% is now mechanically fixed only at the anchor window)

headline_metrics.label: Trade-channel share (GFC)
headline_metrics.note: v1 reported behavioural-29% dominance; v2 re-architected trade composite reveals trade-27.9% dominance

headline_metrics.label: Behavioural-channel share collapse Pre-Crisis
headline_metrics.note: De-confounded behavioural composite removes shared VIX-derivatives with financial channel

headline_metrics.label: Monetary-policy dominant in post-GFC episodes
headline_metrics.note: Once first-differenced policy-rate is used (Romer-Romer narrative shock proxies)

headline_metrics.label: Sample (G20 equity panel)
headline_metrics.note: 18 markets × Jan-12-2006 to Mar-18-2026

headline_metrics.label: Crisis sub-periods analysed
headline_metrics.note: Pre-Crisis / GFC / ESDC / Chinese-Stock-Crash / Pre-COVID / COVID / Russia-Ukraine / Mid-East-Tariffs

provenance.data_file: papers/contagion-channels/data/G20.xlsx (18 markets) + channel_proxies.xlsx (Trade / Financial / Geopolitical / Behavioural / Monetary)

cross_paper_relationships.relation: earlier-sibling activation-scoring paper; shares Stage 1 (MODWT + WQTE) verbatim; differs in Stage 2 (this paper has structural IV; waveqte has activation scoring)
shares MODWT + TE substrate; different TE estimator (quantile vs binned)

frameworks.title: Multi-Channel Path Following Model (MCPFM)
frameworks.question: Can a protocol-based agent-communication game yield a tractable systemic-risk index?
frameworks.arxiv_note: v1 superseded; v2 corresponds to the FINAL + Validation pair

engine_implementation_notes.transfer_entropy: BINNED via R infotheo package, 10 bins/coord, lag=1
engine_implementation_notes.iaaft_surrogates: Block bootstrap B=200 (NOT IAAFT); see Trade_Wars_FINAL §3
engine_implementation_notes.network_formation: Static one-shot CARA Nash in Theory_Paper; CRRA dynamic Bellman + trust-update in mcp_theory.pdf (companion)
engine_implementation_notes.te_units: nats (natural-log basis); reported via infotheo default; declared in FINAL §3 as of 2026-05-29 patch

headline_metrics.label: SRI AUC (COVID-19 US)
headline_metrics.note: 1-day early warning vs US VIX 0.947 (3.4% gap)

headline_metrics.label: SRI AUC (India trade-war)
headline_metrics.note: vs India VIX 0.531, DeLong test — modest but significant

headline_metrics.label: Sample (India trade-war, evaluable)
headline_metrics.note: 1935 raw - 20 burn-in for 21-day SRI rolling window

headline_metrics.label: TE decay (HFT 2-4d to long 32-64d)
headline_metrics.note: Monotone 61% decline — validates multi-scale economic foundations

headline_metrics.label: Network density (75th-pct threshold)
headline_metrics.note: Mechanically fixed by threshold rule; not a finding (artifact disclosed)

shares MODWT + multi-scale-TE substrate; contagion-channels uses quantile-conditioned TE + Stage-2 structural channel attribution

frameworks.title: Network Adaptive Market Hypothesis
frameworks.question: Does network-mediated adaptive efficiency explain Hurst-exponent crisis dynamics across G20 equity + commodity panels?

engine_implementation_notes.long_memory: DFA via namh-pkg::run_dfa with rolling 252-day window
engine_implementation_notes.transfer_entropy: KSG k-NN (k=4) via RANN::nn2 in namh-pkg::ksg_cond_mi
engine_implementation_notes.iaaft_surrogates: B=200 IAAFT (Schreiber & Schmitz 2000); MC SE on empirical p ~ 0.015

headline_metrics.label: Spectral radius peak (ρ̂)
headline_metrics.note: Max rho_post in the canonical magnitude_30 gate — well below 1, confirms Hawkins-Simon contractivity of the gated HWTE operator (live-computed)

headline_metrics.label: Diagnostic windows estimated
headline_metrics.note: 20 macro-windows spanning 2001–2025 in the magnitude_30 diagnostic panel (24 markets × 20 windows = 480 Hurst rows); live-computed

headline_metrics.label: Hurst median (24 markets × 20 windows)
headline_metrics.note: Median DFA Hurst across the panel — just below 0.5, indicating mild mean-reversion on average (live-computed)

cross_paper_relationships.relation: shares MODWT substrate; different TE estimator (KSG vs binned); different question
shares Hurst + Leiden substrate; contagion-channels adds Stage-2 channel attribution

frameworks.title: Wavelet-Quantile Transfer Entropy (activation-scoring earlier sibling)
frameworks.question: Earlier-sibling approach to the same contagion-channel question, using hand-crafted activation-scoring formulas in place of structural IV identification.
frameworks.arxiv_note: NOT arXiv:2604.26546 — that's the paper3_v2 sibling. The waveqte PDF is currently working-paper-only; see PI for IREF-revision status (paper might be the IREF-D-26-02932 base manuscript).

engine_implementation_notes.transfer_entropy: QTE via Koenker quantile-regression predictive gain (same as paper3 Stage 1)
engine_implementation_notes.iaaft_surrogates: NOT reported (limitation §6.3 of the working paper); R-package bootstrap_qte() defaults B=1000
engine_implementation_notes.te_units: log_2 (Eq.2) vs natural log (Eq.5) — internal inconsistency, flagged for polish
engine_implementation_notes.stage_2_method: Hand-crafted activation-scoring formulas (Eqs 9-13) with calibrated constants — NOT structural IV. CTE validation (Eq 15-16) deferred to future work per §6.3 p.26.

headline_metrics.label: Sample (G20 equity)
headline_metrics.note: 18 markets × Jan-5-2004 to Jun-28-2024

headline_metrics.label: Crisis sub-periods analysed
headline_metrics.note: Pre-Crisis / GFC / EuroDebt / ChineseCrash / Pre-COVID / COVID / Russia-Ukraine — ONE LESS than paper3 (no Mid-East-Tariffs window)

headline_metrics.label: Pre-Crisis dominant channel
headline_metrics.note: Hand-crafted activation-scoring result; differs from paper3's structural-IV Pre-Crisis result

headline_metrics.label: Trade share (GFC)
headline_metrics.note: Activation-scoring approach yields Trade-GFC = 3.9% vs paper3's structural-IV Trade-GFC = 27.9%; structural reframing reverses the qualitative conclusion

headline_metrics.label: Network density (clustered 22.2-25.2%)
headline_metrics.note: Artifact of 75th-percentile threshold; paper3 v2 fixes via absolute thresholding

outputs.note: No live output dir tracked here — the active codebase is the older WaveQTE-master under commodity/. paper3 superseded the workflow.

cross_paper_relationships.relation: Direct successor — paper3 is the structural-IV upgrade addressing waveqte Limitation 1 (activation-scoring -> IV identification). Same Stage 1 verbatim.
WaveQTE-master codebase under commodity/ is the historical home

frameworks.disposition_notes: P2-5 squad memo (2026-05-29) flagged title/byline confusion: PI's spec abstract conflated waveqte with paper3. Two separate papers, share Stage 1, different Stage 2. arXiv:2604.26546 IS paper3 (verified 2026-05-30), NOT waveqte. Recommendation: rename waveqte PDF to disambiguate, or formally retire it once paper3 published.

consistency_markers.note: Different scientific questions warrant different window choices (rolling vs full-period; daily vs trading-day rolling)
Only NAMH uses KSG; others use binned or quantile-conditioned TE
MCPFM uses block-bootstrap not IAAFT; B differs by paper; commodity has none (flagged as open issue)
NAMH declares bits canonical (2026-05-29 patch); MCPFM+contagion+commodity use nats; waveqte has internal inconsistency Eq.2 vs Eq.5
Footnoted in NAMH_Revised.tex (2026-05-29 patch); papers using long-history panels use Brunnermeier-style early start
Each estimator answers a different question; KSG = exact MI estimation, binned = block-bootstrap friendly, quantile = tail-aware
Foundations preamble adds \let\varphi\phi to unify the monograph
NAMH had aot2015/aots2015 split across Parts; unified to aots2015 in 2026-05-29 Phase-0 patch 0.6
Algorithm choice tied to network properties — Leiden for dense KSG-TE networks, Walktrap for sparse quantile-TE, CNM for commodity baskets
MCPFM Validation = COVID only; Trade-Wars = trade-war days only; others span longer history
AHRC proposal §6 now cites both honest numbers (2026-05-29 D0 fix); previous 0.924 from disavowed Asia-Pacific draft
Misplaced R-packages under commodity/ need git mv; commodityFC needs author + man + tests before CRAN
